examples: The destocking drives the sales price down.
Destocking on a huge scale has further slashed output.
The immediate causes are plain enough: destocking on a huge scale and a collapse in exports.
Comps are getting very easy in metals and industrials, and, excluding the destocking effect, even stabilization would be positive.
Disappointingly, inventories grew by 0.1%, which dashes hopes that the slowdown in economic growth was only a temporary consequence of destocking by businesses.
